description: Bodyweight-normalized strength-competition coefficients (SPEC.md §3.2, OB-31). OpenBody has no demographics/identity model — these are ordinary `Measurement` records the producing app computes externally (supplying sex/bodyweight-class from its own user profile, never from OpenBody) and stores with `links: [{type: "derivedFrom", ref: ...}]` pointing at the bodyweight Measurement and lift-total WorkUnit it was computed from, plus `provenance.algorithm.name/version` naming the coefficient. A narrow seed, not the full measurement-type registry (OB-13) — that covers the general physiological/telemetry token space.

tokens.label: Wilks Score
tokens.description: Bodyweight-normalized powerlifting total (2020 formula, sex-specific coefficients).

tokens.label: DOTS Score
tokens.description: Bodyweight-normalized powerlifting total; successor to Wilks with a flatter curve at the extremes.

tokens.label: IPF GL Points
tokens.description: IPF GL (Goodlift) points — the coefficient used in IPF-affiliated competition.

tokens.label: Glossbrenner Score
tokens.description: Bodyweight-normalized total, historically used in some multi-ply/raw federations.
